1.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very

figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
2.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

2.dv: from a compound of G1537 (ἐκ) and a derivative of G2564 (καλέω);

3.kj: acceptable, benefit, favour, gift, grace(- ious), joy, liberality, pleasure, thank(-s, -worthy)

3.gl: peace (literally or figuratively); by implication, prosperity
